languages.text: "Благодарю вас. В конце концов нам удалось поладить".
"Thank you. It took time, but we have come to an understanding."
languages.original_text: "Благодарю вас. В конце концов нам удалось поладить".

traits.locale_text: "Thank you. It took time, but we have come to an understanding."
"Thank you. It took time, but we have come to an understanding."
"Thank you. It took time, but we have come to an understanding."
"Thank you. It took time, but we have come to an understanding."
"Thank you. It took time, but we have come to an understanding."

languages.text: "Danke. Es hat zwar etwas gedauert, aber wir konnten uns verständigen."
languages.original_text: "Thank you. It took time, but we have come to an understanding."

traits.locale_text: "Danke. Es hat zwar etwas gedauert, aber wir konnten uns verständigen."

languages.text: « Merci. Il aura fallu du temps, mais nous avons trouvé un terrain d'entente. »
languages.original_text: "Thank you. It took time, but we have come to an understanding."

traits.locale_text: « Merci. Il aura fallu du temps, mais nous avons trouvé un terrain d'entente. »

languages.text: «Gracias. Ha llevado tiempo, pero hemos conseguido llegar a un acuerdo».
languages.original_text: "Thank you. It took time, but we have come to an understanding."

traits.locale_text: «Gracias. Ha llevado tiempo, pero hemos conseguido llegar a un acuerdo».

languages.text: "Teşekkür ederim. Zaman alsa da anlaşmaya vardık."
languages.original_text: "Thank you. It took time, but we have come to an understanding."

traits.locale_text: "Teşekkür ederim. Zaman alsa da anlaşmaya vardık."

languages.text: “谢谢。虽然费了些功夫，但我们总算达成了共识。”
languages.original_text: "Thank you. It took time, but we have come to an understanding."

traits.locale_text: “谢谢。虽然费了些功夫，但我们总算达成了共识。”

languages.text: 「ありがとうございます。時間がかかったですが、理解に達しました。」
languages.original_text: "Thank you. It took time, but we have come to an understanding."

traits.locale_text: 「ありがとうございます。時間がかかったですが、理解に達しました。」
